channel.title: Sql on Jakob Külzer
channel.description: Recent content in Sql on Jakob Külzer

item.title: I Really Want to Love sqlc
item.author: jakob.kuelzer@gmail.com (Jakob Külzer)
item.description: I really, really like sqlc. If you’re unfamiliar, it’s a tool that takes (slightly) annotated SQL and generates Go code to execute these queries. I prefer it over ORMs as I don’t have to learn another specific DSL that always tends to break down when I have to write specific joins or other aggregations. Instead, I write raw SQL. Another nice property of the custom tailored go code is that it’s not making use of any. Instead everything is a concrete type giving you extra type safety.
